# Mit18 05 S22 Exam1 Sn Table

---

18.05 Simple Normal Table
Since we generally have access to computers there is no need for the comprehensive tables
of old. This table is designed to be complete enough and easy to use for exams.
Standard normal table of left tail probabilities.
